title: Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team
gist: This is a Springer Nature editorial-staff directory page listing the Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team and their academic biographies. It contains no research findings, theses, market signal, or investable content; it is an organizational/HR page only.

insights.claim: Springer Nature operates a Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team, led by Prateek Dongare since January 2024, that works flexibly across Nature and Nature Research Journals handling primary research manuscripts.
insights.speaker: Nature Machine Intelligence
insights.so_what: No investor relevance; documents only the existence and staffing of a publisher's internal editorial team.
insights.quote: The Research Cross-Journal Editorial Team supports the Nature-branded research journals, with a focus on handling primary research manuscripts.
